questions.question: I ___ play the piano when I was young. (～できた)
questions.explanation: canの過去形は could です

questions.question: I ___ visit my grandmother every Sunday. (よく～した)
questions.explanation: 過去の習慣は would を使います

questions.question: She ___ be a teacher. (～だったかもしれない)
questions.explanation: 過去の推量は might have been を使います

questions.question: You ___ studied harder. (～すべきだった)
questions.explanation: 過去の後悔は should have + 過去分詞です

questions.question: I ___ finish my homework yesterday. (～できなかった)
questions.explanation: 過去の能力がないは could not を使います

questions.question: He ___ done his homework. (～したかもしれない)
questions.explanation: 過去の推量は may have + 過去分詞です

questions.question: I ___ swim when I was a child. (～できた)
questions.explanation: 過去の能力は could を使います

questions.question: You ___ told me earlier. (～すべきだった)
questions.explanation: 過去の後悔は should have + 過去分詞です
